key_ingredients.name: Dandelion Root Extract
key_ingredients.function: Natural diuretic — stimulates kidneys to increase urine output
key_ingredients.evidence: Moderate — small human trials confirm diuretic effect
key_ingredients.talking_point: One of the most trusted natural diuretics used for decades

key_ingredients.name: Uva Ursi (Bearberry) Leaf Extract
key_ingredients.function: Urinary tract support, mild natural diuretic
key_ingredients.evidence: Traditional use, limited modern clinical trials
key_ingredients.talking_point: Used in traditional medicine for urinary health for centuries

key_ingredients.name: Buchu Leaf Extract
key_ingredients.evidence: Traditional South African herbal medicine, limited trials
key_ingredients.talking_point: Rare herbal ingredient from South Africa

key_ingredients.name: Juniper Berry Extract
key_ingredients.talking_point: Synergistic with dandelion for faster water loss

target_audience.primary: Bodybuilders and physique athletes cutting water weight before competition
target_audience.secondary: Fitness enthusiasts reducing bloating before events or photo shoots
target_audience.tertiary: General public seeking natural bloat reduction

use_cases: Cutting phase of a fitness program
risks_and_disclaimers: Stay well hydrated — diuretics increase dehydration risk significantly
Not for people with kidney disease or kidney conditions
Not for pregnant or nursing women
May interact with blood pressure medications and diuretic drugs
Consult a doctor before use if on any medication
Not for long-term daily use — cycle off regularly
competitive_advantages: All-natural herbal formula — no harsh synthetic diuretics
America's best-selling diuretic — proven market demand
MHP brand reputation in professional bodybuilding

script_talking_points.value_prop: Flush out excess water, reduce bloating, support weight loss — naturally
script_talking_points.ingredients_pitch: Dandelion root, Uva Ursi, Buchu leaf — all natural herbal ingredients
script_talking_points.responsible_use: Stay hydrated. Check with doctor if you have kidney issues.
